description: 17 wallpaper groups, crystallographic lattices, ornamental traditions (96 symmetry keys)

14.2_ornamental_traditions.alhambra_zellige: Moorish glazed tilework, turquoise-ochre, arabesque motifs
14.2_ornamental_traditions.muqarnas: 3D stalactite cellular vault geometry, gilded domes
14.2_ornamental_traditions.escher: Interlocking creatures, morphing angels/fish/lizards, impossible tessellations

14.3_computational_cosmic.hyperbolic_tiling: Curved-space tessellation, recursive shrinkage, infinite boundary
14.3_computational_cosmic.quasicrystals: Aperiodic metallic lattices, fivefold symmetry, Penrose patterns
14.3_computational_cosmic.morphogenetic: Reaction-diffusion tiling, zebra/coral stripes, biological patterns
